title: ULA Launches Latest Batch of 29 Satellites for the Amazon Leo Satellite Internet Constellation - SpaceWatch.GLOBAL
summary_full: ULA Launches Latest Batch of 29 Satellites for the Amazon Leo Satellite Internet Constellation  SpaceWatch.GLOBALAtlas V rocket launches its heaviest-ever payload, sending 29 Amazon internet satellites to orbit  SpaceAfter liftoff, Cape Canaveral rocket launch may be seen in Tallahassee  Tallahassee DemocratAtlas 5 launches Amazon Leo satellites  SpaceNewsAmazon satellite launch recap: Live updates from Florida Atlas V rocket launch  Florida Today
